---
title: "results"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(sceptre)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(Matrix)
library(parallel)
library(BH)
library(Rcpp)
library(peakRAM)
library(heavytailcombtest)
library(gridExtra)
library(eulerr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(ACAT)
library(MASS)


gg_qqplot_list <- function(pval_list, ci = 0.95, cap = 6, title = "QQ Plot") {
  # pval_list: named list of numeric p-value vectors

  # 1. 构造数据框：method, p
  pts_df <- map_dfr(names(pval_list), function(name) {
    tibble(
      Method = name,
      p = pval_list[[name]]
    )
  })

  # 2. 清洗和排序
  pts_df <- pts_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(p), p > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      observed = pmin(-log10(p), cap)
    ) %>%
    group_by(Method) %>%
    arrange(p, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      rank_idx = row_number(),
      n = n(),
      expected = -log10(ppoints(n))[rank_idx]
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  # 3. 构造 envelope（以最大 n 为准）
  max_n <- max(pts_df$n)
  exp_env <- -log10(ppoints(max_n))
  lower_env <- pmin(-log10(qbeta((1 - ci)/2, seq_len(max_n), rev(seq_len(max_n)))), cap)
  upper_env <- pmin(-log10(qbeta((1 + ci)/2, seq_len(max_n), rev(seq_len(max_n)))), cap)

  env_df <- tibble(
    expected = c(exp_env, rev(exp_env)),
    ymin = c(lower_env, rev(upper_env)),
    ymax = c(upper_env, rev(lower_env))
  )

  # 4. 作图
  ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = env_df, aes(x = expected, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
                fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_line(data = pts_df,
              aes(x = expected, y = observed, color = Method, group = Method),
              size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = pts_df,
               aes(x = expected, y = observed, color = Method),
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = expression(Expected~-log[10](italic(P))),
      y = expression(Observed~-log[10](italic(P))),
      color = "Method"
    ) +
    ylim(0, cap) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
}


gg_qqplot <- function(ps, ci = 0.95, title = "QQ Plot") {
  n <- length(ps)
  df <- data.frame(
    observed = pmin(-log10(sort(ps)), 6), # Cap observed values at 4
    expected = -log10(ppoints(n)),
    clower = pmin(-log10(qbeta(p = (1 - ci) / 2, shape1 = 1:n, shape2 = n:1)), 6), # Cap clower values at 4
    cupper = pmin(-log10(qbeta(p = (1 + ci) / 2, shape1 = 1:n, shape2 = n:1)), 6)  # Cap cupper values at 4
  )

  log10Pe <- expression(paste("Expected -log"[10], plain(P)))
  log10Po <- expression(paste("Observed -log"[10], plain(P)))

  ggplot(df) +
    geom_ribbon(mapping = aes(x = expected, ymin = clower, ymax = cupper), alpha = 0.1) +
    geom_point(aes(expected, observed), size = 1.5, color = "red") +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
    xlab(log10Pe) + 
    ylab(log10Po) +
    ylim(0, 6) + # Limit y-axis to 0-5
    ggtitle(title) # Add title
}



library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

gg_qqplot_df <- function(pmat,
                         ci    = 0.95,
                         title = "QQ Plot",
                         cap   = 6) {
  # pmat: numeric data.frame or matrix; rows = methods, cols = p-values
  # ci:   confidence level for the envelope
  # title: plot title
  # cap:  maximum -log10(p) to display
  
  # 1. reshape & filter out NAs, compute expected & observed per method
  pmat[pmat<=0]<-1e-250
    pmat[pmat>=1]<-1-1e-250
  pts_df <- pmat %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    rownames_to_column("Method") %>% 
    pivot_longer(-Method, names_to="dummy", values_to="p") %>% 
    filter(!is.na(p)) %>%          # drop NAs
    group_by(Method) %>% 
    arrange(p) %>% 
    mutate(
      rank_idx = row_number(),
      n_i      = n(),                                 # how many p’s
      expected = -log10(ppoints(n_i))[rank_idx],      # expected quantile
      observed = pmin(-log10(p), cap)                 # cap at ‘cap’
    ) %>% 
    ungroup()
  
  # 2. build a single envelope for the *largest* group size
  max_n <- pts_df %>% pull(n_i) %>% max()
  exp_env <- -log10(ppoints(max_n))
  lower_env <- pmin(-log10(qbeta((1-ci)/2,  seq_len(max_n), rev(seq_len(max_n)))), cap)
  upper_env <- pmin(-log10(qbeta((1+ci)/2,  seq_len(max_n), rev(seq_len(max_n)))), cap)
  env_df <- tibble(expected = exp_env, ymin = lower_env, ymax = upper_env)
  
  # 3. plot
  ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = env_df,
                aes(x = expected, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
                fill  = "grey80", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_line(data = pts_df,
              aes(x = expected, y = observed, color = Method, group = Method),
              size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = pts_df,
               aes(x = expected, y = observed, color = Method),
               size = 1.5) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(title = title,
         x     = expression(Expected~ -log[10](P)),
         y     = expression(Observed~ -log[10](P)),
         color = "Method") +
    ylim(0, cap) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
}


combine_p_by_target<- function(P, map, non_targeting_label = "non-targeting") {
  stopifnot(!is.null(rownames(P)))
  # 去重并按 P 行对齐
  if (any(duplicated(map$grna_id))) {
    map <- map[!duplicated(map$grna_id), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  miss <- setdiff(rownames(P), map$grna_id)
  if (length(miss)) stop("map 缺少这些 grna_id: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))
  map <- map[match(rownames(P), map$grna_id), , drop = FALSE]

  is_nt <- map$grna_target == non_targeting_label

  ## 1) 非靶向：原样保留（行名继续用 grna_id）
  P_nt   <- P[is_nt, , drop = FALSE]               # 不做任何修改

  ## 2) 其它 target：按 target 合并为一行（Bonferroni：k * min）
  P_g    <- P[!is_nt, , drop = FALSE]
  map_g  <- map[!is_nt, , drop = FALSE]
  groups <- split(seq_len(nrow(P_g)), map_g$grna_target)

  res_list <- lapply(names(groups), function(tg) {
    idx <- groups[[tg]]
    sub <- P_g[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    k   <- length(idx)

    any_non_na <- colSums(!is.na(sub)) > 0
    min_p <- rep(NA_real_, ncol(P_g))
    if (any(any_non_na)) {
      min_p[any_non_na] <- apply(sub[, any_non_na, drop = FALSE], 2, min, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
    pmin(1, k * min_p)
  })
  P_comb <- do.call(rbind, res_list)
  rownames(P_comb) <- names(groups)
  colnames(P_comb) <- colnames(P)

  ## 3) 绑定结果：先合并后的 targets，再原样的 non-targeting
  out <- rbind(P_comb, P_nt)
  out
}

## 用法
# P <- as.matrix(max_stat)  # 你的 p 值矩阵
# res <- combine_p_by_target_keep_nt(P, map, non_targeting_label = "non-targeting")
# 结果 res：行包含 每个 target 的一行 + 每条 non-targeting guide 的原样行
```

# Morris

```{r,echo=F,include=F}


grna_cutoff<-0

gene_module_index_matrix <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Morris_adjusted/program_data/gene_module_index_matrix.rds")

grna_target_data_frame_omit <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Morris_adjusted/program_data/grna_target_data_frame.rds"))

discovery_pairs_cis <-readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Morris_adjusted/program_data/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")

grna_assignment_matrix <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Morris_adjusted/program_data/union_grna_assignment_matrix.rds")

max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Morris_Hallmark/3000_t_ACAT_default_union/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

max_stat <- max_stat[rowSums(grna_assignment_matrix)>grna_cutoff, ]


sceptre <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/Morris/union/results_run_discovery_analysis.rds")[,c(1,3,7)]
                 
perturbation_gene_qc <- character(0)
 


sceptre <- sceptre[!is.na(sceptre$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_target
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[rownames(max_stat)[rownames(max_stat) %in% rownames(sceptre_wide)], ]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

library(eulerr)




module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)
            print(haha)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(tibble)

max_stat_long <- max_stat%>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "grna_id") %>% # Add row names as a column
  pivot_longer(cols = -grna_id, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_value")

# Remove rows with NA p-values
max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>% filter(!is.na(p_value))






max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>%
  semi_join(module_results_sceptre, by = c("grna_id", "module"))

module_results_sceptre$bh_pval <- p.adjust(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval, method = "BH")
module_results_sceptre$identifier <- paste(module_results_sceptre$grna_id, module_results_sceptre$module, sep = "_")



max_stat_long$bh_pval <-  p.adjust(max_stat_long$p_value, method = "BH")
max_stat_long$identifier <- paste(max_stat_long$grna_id, max_stat_long$module, sep = "_")



```





```{r,include=F}
library(eulerr)

significant_levels <- c(0.05)
# significant_levels <- 0.01
plot_list <- list()

# Loop through significant levels and display plots

significant_ids_gene_wise_p_morris <- na.omit(
  module_results_sceptre$identifier[module_results_sceptre$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


significant_ids_max_stat_morris <- na.omit(
  max_stat_long$identifier[max_stat_long$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


  venn_data <- list(
    `Sceptre+ACAT` = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_morris,
    `OPERA`=significant_ids_max_stat_morris
  )
  
  # Generate the Euler diagram and display it
euler_plot <- plot(
  euler(venn_data),
  fills = list(fill = c("red", "yellow", "orange","blue"), alpha = 0.5),
  edges = TRUE,
  quantities = TRUE,
  labels = list(font = 2, cex = 1.2, pos = 3), # 调整字体和位置
  main = paste("Significant level", significant_levels)
)
p1 <- euler_plot
```


```{r,include=T}

ntc_to_remove <- c(3,11,12)
# ntc_to_remove <- c(100000)
pat_rm <- paste0("(?<!\\d)(", paste(ntc_to_remove, collapse="|"), ")(?!\\d)")


max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Morris_Hallmark/3000_t_ACAT_default_union_/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

ntc_rows <- which(grepl("NTC",rownames(max_stat)))


ntc_morris_OPERA <- max_stat[ntc_rows,]

ntc_morris_OPERA <- ntc_morris_OPERA[!grepl(pat_rm, rownames(ntc_morris_OPERA), perl=TRUE), , drop=FALSE]
p2<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_morris_OPERA,title="OPERA NTC, morris")
p2
```






```{r,include=F}
results_run_calibration_check <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/Morris/union/results_run_calibration_check.rds")[,c(1,2,7)]
sceptre <- results_run_calibration_check[!is.na(results_run_calibration_check$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_id
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

mat_df <- module_results_sceptre %>%
  dplyr::select(grna_id, module, acat_pval) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = module,
    values_from = acat_pval
  )


mat_df_2<- as.matrix(mat_df[,-1])
rownames(mat_df_2) <- mat_df$grna_id

ntc_r <- which(grepl("NTC",mat_df$grna_id))


ntc_morris_SCEPTRE <- mat_df_2[ntc_r,]

ntc_morris_SCEPTRE <- ntc_morris_SCEPTRE[!grepl(pat_rm, rownames(ntc_morris_SCEPTRE), perl=TRUE), , drop=FALSE]

p3<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_morris_SCEPTRE,title="sceptre+ACAT: geneset NTC Morris")
```



```{r,fig.width=7,fig.height=21}
grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,ncol=1)
```

# Xie 

```{r,echo=F,include=F}


grna_cutoff<-0

gene_module_index_matrix <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Xie/program_data/gene_module_index_matrix.rds")

grna_target_data_frame_omit <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Xie/program_data/grna_target_data_frame.rds"))

discovery_pairs_cis <-readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Xie/program_data/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")

grna_assignment_matrix <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Xie/program_data/grna_assignment_matrix.rds")

max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Xie_Hallmark/3000_t_ACAT_default_union_/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

max_stat <- max_stat[rowSums(grna_assignment_matrix)>grna_cutoff, ]


sceptre <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/Xie/union_default/results_run_discovery_analysis.rds")[,c(1,3,7)]
                 
perturbation_gene_qc <- character(0)
 


sceptre <- sceptre[!is.na(sceptre$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_target
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[rownames(max_stat)[rownames(max_stat) %in% rownames(sceptre_wide)], ]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

library(eulerr)




module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)
            print(haha)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(tibble)

max_stat_long <- max_stat%>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "grna_id") %>% # Add row names as a column
  pivot_longer(cols = -grna_id, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_value")

# Remove rows with NA p-values
max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>% filter(!is.na(p_value))






max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>%
  semi_join(module_results_sceptre, by = c("grna_id", "module"))

module_results_sceptre$bh_pval <- p.adjust(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval, method = "BH")
module_results_sceptre$identifier <- paste(module_results_sceptre$grna_id, module_results_sceptre$module, sep = "_")



max_stat_long$bh_pval <-  p.adjust(max_stat_long$p_value, method = "BH")
max_stat_long$identifier <- paste(max_stat_long$grna_id, max_stat_long$module, sep = "_")



```





```{r,include=F}
library(eulerr)

significant_levels <- c(0.05)
# significant_levels <- 0.01
plot_list <- list()

# Loop through significant levels and display plots

significant_ids_gene_wise_p_xie <- na.omit(
  module_results_sceptre$identifier[module_results_sceptre$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


significant_ids_max_stat_xie <- na.omit(
  max_stat_long$identifier[max_stat_long$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


  venn_data <- list(
    `Sceptre+ACAT` = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_xie,
    `OPERA`=significant_ids_max_stat_xie
  )
  
  # Generate the Euler diagram and display it
euler_plot <- plot(
  euler(venn_data),
  fills = list(fill = c("red", "yellow", "orange","blue"), alpha = 0.5),
  edges = TRUE,
  quantities = TRUE,
  labels = list(font = 2, cex = 1.2, pos = 3), # 调整字体和位置
  main = paste("Significant level", significant_levels)
)
p1 <- euler_plot
```


```{r,include=F}
max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Xie_Hallmark/3000_t_ACAT_default_union_/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

ntc_rows <- which(grepl("NTC",rownames(max_stat)))[c(1,3)]

p2<-gg_qqplot_df(max_stat[ntc_rows,],title="OPERA NTC")
```


```{r,include=F}
results_run_calibration_check <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/Xie/union_default/results_run_calibration_check.rds")[,c(1,2,7)]
sceptre <- results_run_calibration_check[!is.na(results_run_calibration_check$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_id
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

mat_df <- module_results_sceptre %>%
  dplyr::select(grna_id, module, acat_pval) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = module,
    values_from = acat_pval
  )
rownames(mat_df) <- mat_df$grna_id
mat_df<-mat_df[,-1]
p3<-gg_qqplot_df(mat_df,title="sceptre+ACAT: geneset NTC")
```



```{r,fig.width=7,fig.height=21}
grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,ncol=1)
```

# Frangieh -IFN gamma

```{r,echo=F,include=F}


grna_cutoff<-0

gene_module_index_matrix <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/ifn_gamma/hallmark_set/gene_module_index_matrix.rds")

grna_target_data_frame_omit <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/ifn_gamma/grna_target_dataframe.rds"))

discovery_pairs_cis <-readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/ifn_gamma/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")

grna_assignment_matrix <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/ifn_gamma/hallmark_set/union_grna_assignment_matrix.rds")

max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/frangieh_ifn_gamma/union_resample_ACAT_factorize_cell_state_30_qc/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

max_stat <- max_stat[rowSums(grna_assignment_matrix)>grna_cutoff, ]


sceptre <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/frangieh_gamma/union_crt_hallmark_set_genes_match_snakemake/results_run_discovery_analysis.rds")[,c(1,3,7)]
                 
perturbation_gene_qc <- character(0)
 


sceptre <- sceptre[!is.na(sceptre$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_target
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[rownames(max_stat)[rownames(max_stat) %in% rownames(sceptre_wide)], ]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

library(eulerr)




module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)
            print(haha)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(tibble)

max_stat_long <- max_stat%>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "grna_id") %>% # Add row names as a column
  pivot_longer(cols = -grna_id, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_value")

# Remove rows with NA p-values
max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>% filter(!is.na(p_value))






max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>%
  semi_join(module_results_sceptre, by = c("grna_id", "module"))

module_results_sceptre$bh_pval <- p.adjust(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval, method = "BH")
module_results_sceptre$identifier <- paste(module_results_sceptre$grna_id, module_results_sceptre$module, sep = "_")



max_stat_long$bh_pval <-  p.adjust(max_stat_long$p_value, method = "BH")
max_stat_long$identifier <- paste(max_stat_long$grna_id, max_stat_long$module, sep = "_")



```





```{r,include=F}
library(eulerr)

significant_levels <- c(0.05)
# significant_levels <- 0.01
plot_list <- list()

# Loop through significant levels and display plots

significant_ids_gene_wise_p_frangieh_ifn <- na.omit(
  module_results_sceptre$identifier[module_results_sceptre$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


significant_ids_max_stat_frangieh_ifn <- na.omit(
  max_stat_long$identifier[max_stat_long$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


  venn_data <- list(
    `Sceptre+ACAT` = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_frangieh_ifn,
    `OPERA`=significant_ids_max_stat_frangieh_ifn
  )
  
  # Generate the Euler diagram and display it
euler_plot <- plot(
  euler(venn_data),
  fills = list(fill = c("red", "yellow", "orange","blue"), alpha = 0.5),
  edges = TRUE,
  quantities = TRUE,
  labels = list(font = 2, cex = 1.2, pos = 3), # 调整字体和位置
  main = paste("Significant level", significant_levels)
)
p1 <- euler_plot
```


```{r}
ntc_to_remove <- c(36,707,81,836,736,386,38,47,172,40)
ntc_to_remove <- c(913,963,187,812,678,960)
ntc_to_remove <- c(172,707,36,836,963,146,913,820,736,81,812)
ntc_to_remove <- c(707,736,81)



pat_rm <- paste0("(?<!\\d)(", paste(ntc_to_remove, collapse="|"), ")(?!\\d)")


max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/frangieh_ifn_gamma/union_resample_ACAT_factorize_cell_state_30_qc/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

ntc_rows <- which(grepl("NO_",rownames(max_stat)))


ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA <- max_stat[ntc_rows,]
ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA <- ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA[!grepl(pat_rm, rownames(ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA), perl=TRUE), , drop=FALSE]


p2<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA,title="OPERA NTC, frangieh (ifn_gamma)")
p2

gg_qqplot(as.vector(as.matrix(ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA)),title="OPERA Frangieh (ifn_gamma) no perturbation_gene_qc at all")
```


```{r,include=F}
results_run_calibration_check <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/frangieh_gamma/union_crt_hallmark_set_genes_match_snakemake/results_run_calibration_check.rds")[,c(1,2,7)]

results_run_calibration_check <- results_run_calibration_check[which(grepl("NO_SITE",results_run_calibration_check$grna_id)),]
sceptre <- results_run_calibration_check[!is.na(results_run_calibration_check$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_id
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

mat_df <- module_results_sceptre %>%
  dplyr::select(grna_id, module, acat_pval) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = module,
    values_from = acat_pval
  )

mat_df_2<- as.matrix(mat_df[,-1])
rownames(mat_df_2) <- mat_df$grna_id

ntc_r <- which(grepl("NO_SITE",mat_df$grna_id))


ntc_frangieh_ifn_SCEPTRE <- mat_df_2[ntc_r,]

ntc_frangieh_ifn_SCEPTRE <- ntc_frangieh_ifn_SCEPTRE[!grepl(pat_rm, rownames(ntc_frangieh_ifn_SCEPTRE), perl=TRUE), , drop=FALSE]

p3<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_frangieh_ifn_SCEPTRE,title="sceptre+ACAT: geneset NTC Friangieh (ifn gamma)")
```



```{r,fig.width=10,fig.height=21}
grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,ncol=1)
```

# Frangieh -control

```{r,echo=F,include=F}


grna_cutoff<-0

gene_module_index_matrix <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/control/hallmark_set/gene_module_index_matrix.rds")

grna_target_data_frame_omit <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/control/grna_target_dataframe.rds"))

discovery_pairs_cis <-readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/control/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")

grna_assignment_matrix <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/frangieh/control/hallmark_set/union_grna_assignment_matrix.rds")

max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/frangieh_control/union_resample_ACAT_factorize_phase_30_qc/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

max_stat <- max_stat[rowSums(grna_assignment_matrix)>grna_cutoff, ]


sceptre <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/frangieh_control/union_crt_hallmark_set_genes_match_snakemake_30qc_factorize_phase/results_run_discovery_analysis.rds")[,c(1,3,7)]
                 
perturbation_gene_qc <- character(0)
 


sceptre <- sceptre[!is.na(sceptre$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_target
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[rownames(max_stat)[rownames(max_stat) %in% rownames(sceptre_wide)], ]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

library(eulerr)




module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)
            print(haha)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(tibble)

max_stat_long <- max_stat%>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "grna_id") %>% # Add row names as a column
  pivot_longer(cols = -grna_id, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_value")

# Remove rows with NA p-values
max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>% filter(!is.na(p_value))






max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>%
  semi_join(module_results_sceptre, by = c("grna_id", "module"))

module_results_sceptre$bh_pval <- p.adjust(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval, method = "BH")
module_results_sceptre$identifier <- paste(module_results_sceptre$grna_id, module_results_sceptre$module, sep = "_")



max_stat_long$bh_pval <-  p.adjust(max_stat_long$p_value, method = "BH")
max_stat_long$identifier <- paste(max_stat_long$grna_id, max_stat_long$module, sep = "_")



```





```{r,include=F}
library(eulerr)

significant_levels <- c(0.05)
# significant_levels <- 0.01
plot_list <- list()

# Loop through significant levels and display plots

significant_ids_gene_wise_p_frangieh_control <- na.omit(
  module_results_sceptre$identifier[module_results_sceptre$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


significant_ids_max_stat_frangieh_control  <- na.omit(
  max_stat_long$identifier[max_stat_long$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


  venn_data <- list(
    `Sceptre+ACAT` = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_frangieh_control,
    `OPERA`=significant_ids_max_stat_frangieh_control
  )
  
  # Generate the Euler diagram and display it
euler_plot <- plot(
  euler(venn_data),
  fills = list(fill = c("red", "yellow", "orange","blue"), alpha = 0.5),
  edges = TRUE,
  quantities = TRUE,
  labels = list(font = 2, cex = 1.2, pos = 3), # 调整字体和位置
  main = paste("Significant level", significant_levels)
)
p1 <- euler_plot
```




```{r}
ntc_to_remove <- c(136,963,694,36,812,716,707,304,355,172)
ntc_to_remove <- c(812,707,694,136,36,716)


pat_rm <- paste0("(?<!\\d)(", paste(ntc_to_remove, collapse="|"), ")(?!\\d)")


max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/frangieh_control/union_resample_ACAT_factorize_phase_30_qc/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))


# max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/frangieh_control/union_resample_wrong/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))
ntc_rows <- which(grepl("NO_",rownames(max_stat)))


ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA <- max_stat[ntc_rows,]
ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA <- ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA[!grepl(pat_rm, rownames(ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA), perl=TRUE), , drop=FALSE]


p2<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA,title="OPERA NTC Frangieh control")
p2

gg_qqplot(as.vector(as.matrix(ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA)),title="OPERA Frangieh NTC, REMOVING 5 guides")
```



```{r,include=F}
results_run_calibration_check <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/frangieh_control/union_crt_hallmark_set_genes_match_snakemake_30qc_factorize_phase/results_run_calibration_check.rds")[,c(1,2,7)]
sceptre <- results_run_calibration_check[!is.na(results_run_calibration_check$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_id
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

mat_df <- module_results_sceptre %>%
  dplyr::select(grna_id, module, acat_pval) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = module,
    values_from = acat_pval
  )
mat_df_2<- as.matrix(mat_df[,-1])
rownames(mat_df_2) <- mat_df$grna_id

ntc_r <- which(grepl("NO_SITE",mat_df$grna_id))


ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE <- mat_df_2[ntc_r,]

ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE <- ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE[!grepl(pat_rm, rownames(ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE), perl=TRUE), , drop=FALSE]

p3<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE,title="sceptre+ACAT: geneset NTC frangieh (control)")
gg_qqplot(as.vector(as.matrix(ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE)))
```



```{r,fig.width=10,fig.height=21}
grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,ncol=1)
```

# papalexi


```{r,echo=F,include=F}
grna_cutoff<-0

gene_module_index_matrix <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/papalexi/gene_module_index_matrix.rds")

grna_target_data_frame_omit <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/papalexi/grna_target_dataframe.rds"))

discovery_pairs_cis <-readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/papalexi/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")

grna_assignment_matrix <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/papalexi/union_grna_assignment_matrix.rds")

max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/papalexi_Hallmark/union_3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

max_stat <- max_stat[rowSums(grna_assignment_matrix)>grna_cutoff, ]


sceptre <-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/papalexi/union_crt_match_snakemake/results_run_discovery_analysis.rds")[,c(1,3,7)]
                 
perturbation_gene_qc <- character(0)
 


sceptre <- sceptre[!is.na(sceptre$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_target
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[rownames(max_stat)[rownames(max_stat) %in% rownames(sceptre_wide)], ]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

library(eulerr)




module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)
            print(haha)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(tibble)

max_stat_long <- max_stat%>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "grna_id") %>% # Add row names as a column
  pivot_longer(cols = -grna_id, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_value")

# Remove rows with NA p-values
max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>% filter(!is.na(p_value))






max_stat_long <- max_stat_long %>%
  semi_join(module_results_sceptre, by = c("grna_id", "module"))

module_results_sceptre$bh_pval <- p.adjust(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval, method = "BH")
module_results_sceptre$identifier <- paste(module_results_sceptre$grna_id, module_results_sceptre$module, sep = "_")



max_stat_long$bh_pval <-  p.adjust(max_stat_long$p_value, method = "BH")
max_stat_long$identifier <- paste(max_stat_long$grna_id, max_stat_long$module, sep = "_")



```





```{r,include=F}
library(eulerr)

significant_levels <- c(0.05)
# significant_levels <- 0.01
plot_list <- list()

# Loop through significant levels and display plots

significant_ids_gene_wise_p_papalexi <- na.omit(
  module_results_sceptre$identifier[module_results_sceptre$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


significant_ids_max_stat_papalexi <- na.omit(
  max_stat_long$identifier[max_stat_long$bh_pval < significant_levels]
)


  venn_data <- list(
    `Sceptre+ACAT` = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_papalexi,
    `OPERA`=significant_ids_max_stat_papalexi
  )
  
  # Generate the Euler diagram and display it
euler_plot <- plot(
  euler(venn_data),
  fills = list(fill = c("red", "yellow", "orange","blue"), alpha = 0.5),
  edges = TRUE,
  quantities = TRUE,
  labels = list(font = 2, cex = 1.2, pos = 3), # 调整字体和位置
  main = paste("Significant level", significant_levels)
)
p1 <- euler_plot
```


```{r,include=F}
max_stat <- as.data.frame(readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/papalexi_Hallmark/union_3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds"))

ntc_rows <- which(grepl("NTg",rownames(max_stat)))
ntc_papalexi_OPERA <- max_stat[ntc_rows,]
p2<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_papalexi_OPERA,title="OPERA NTC")
```


```{r,include=F}
results_run_calibration_check <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/sceptre/papalexi/union_crt_match_snakemake/results_run_calibration_check.rds")[,c(1,2,7)]
sceptre <- results_run_calibration_check[!is.na(results_run_calibration_check$p_value), ]
sceptre$p_value[sceptre$p_value >=1] <- 1 - 1e-6

sceptre_wide <- sceptre %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = response_id, values_from = p_value) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set the row names to be the grna_id and remove the grna_id column
rownames(sceptre_wide) <- sceptre_wide$grna_id
sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, -1]

sceptre_wide <- sceptre_wide[, colnames(sceptre_wide)%in%rownames(gene_module_index_matrix), drop = FALSE]

module_results <- list()

# Iterate over each row of t_gene_p_no_approximation to compute ACAT p-values for each module
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sceptre_wide))) {
  grna_id <- rownames(sceptre_wide)[i]
  p_values_row <- sceptre_wide[i,] 
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store ACAT p-values and module names for each module
  module_acat_pvals <- c()
  module_names <- c()
 matched_targets <-grna_id
  cis_genes <- discovery_pairs_cis[discovery_pairs_cis$grna_target == matched_targets, ]$response_id  
  
if (grna_id %in% rownames(perturbation_gene_qc)) {
  remove_genes <- perturbation_gene_qc[grna_id, 2][[1]]
 
} else {
  remove_genes <- character(0)  # 
}
  
  
  # Iterate over each module in gene_modules to combine p-values using ACAT
  for (j in 1:ncol(gene_module_index_matrix)) {
    
    
    module_name <- colnames(gene_module_index_matrix)[j]  # Get the module name

    module_genes <- rownames(gene_module_index_matrix)[gene_module_index_matrix[, j] == 1]
module_genes <- intersect(module_genes, colnames(p_values_row))
    
      module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, cis_genes) 
      haha<-length(module_genes)
            module_genes <- setdiff(module_genes, remove_genes)

      
    
    # Only apply ACAT if there are genes to combine and they are not NA
    if (length(module_genes) > 0) {
      module_p_values <- as.numeric(p_values_row[module_genes])
      module_p_values <- module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)]  # Remove NAs
      
      if (length(module_p_values) > 0) {
        acat_pval <- ACAT(module_p_values)
        
#      acat_pval <- combination.test(
#   module_p_values[!is.na(module_p_values)],
#   weights = NA,
#   method = "Cauchy",
#   tail.idx = 1
# )


        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, acat_pval)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      } else {
        # print("dont have valid p values for that module")
        module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
        module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
      }
    } else {
      
      # print("dont have valid gene in that module")
      module_acat_pvals <- c(module_acat_pvals, NA)
      module_names <- c(module_names, module_name)
    }
  }
  
  # Store results as a data frame in the list
  module_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    grna_id = grna_id,
    module = module_names,
    acat_pval = module_acat_pvals
  )
}


# Combine all results into a single data frame
module_results_sceptre <- do.call(rbind, module_results)
module_results_sceptre <- module_results_sceptre[!is.na(module_results_sceptre$acat_pval), ]

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

mat_df <- module_results_sceptre %>%
  dplyr::select(grna_id, module, acat_pval) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = module,
    values_from = acat_pval
  )
rownames(mat_df) <- mat_df$grna_id
mat_df<-mat_df[,-1]

ntc_papalexi_SCEPTRE <- mat_df
p3<-gg_qqplot_df(ntc_papalexi_SCEPTRE,title="sceptre+ACAT: geneset NTC")
```



```{r,fig.width=7,fig.height=21}
grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,ncol=1)
```

# Fig. 1B (barplot)



```{r}
make_bar_df <- function(sig_sceptre, sig_opera, dataset_name){
  sig_sceptre <- unique(na.omit(sig_sceptre))
  sig_opera   <- unique(na.omit(sig_opera))

  shared  <- intersect(sig_sceptre, sig_opera)
  sc_only <- setdiff(sig_sceptre, sig_opera)
  op_only <- setdiff(sig_opera, sig_sceptre)

  tibble(
    dataset = dataset_name,
    method  = c("Sceptre+ACAT","Sceptre+ACAT","OPERA","OPERA"),
    segment = c("Shared","Sceptre+ACAT only","Shared","OPERA only"),
    count   = c(length(shared), length(sc_only), length(shared), length(op_only))
  )
}

# 你把每个dataset的两个向量放这里
sig_list <- list(
  Morris = list(
    sceptre = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_morris,
    opera     = significant_ids_max_stat_morris
  ),
  Xie = list(
    sceptre = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_xie,
    opera     = significant_ids_max_stat_xie
  ),
  Frangieh_ifn_gamma = list(
    sceptre = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_frangieh_ifn,
    opera     = significant_ids_max_stat_frangieh_ifn
  ),
    Frangieh_control = list(
    sceptre = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_frangieh_control,
    opera     = significant_ids_max_stat_frangieh_control
  ),
      Papalexi = list(
    sceptre = significant_ids_gene_wise_p_papalexi,
    opera     = significant_ids_max_stat_papalexi
  )
)

plot_df <- bind_rows(lapply(names(sig_list), function(ds){
  make_bar_df(sig_list[[ds]]$sceptre, sig_list[[ds]]$opera, ds)
})) %>%
  mutate(
    method  = factor(method, levels = c("Sceptre+ACAT","OPERA")),
    segment = factor(segment, levels = c("Shared","Sceptre+ACAT only","OPERA only"))
  )
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    segment = factor(segment,
                     levels = c("Shared", "Sceptre+ACAT only", "OPERA only"))
  )

desired_order <- c("Xie", "Morris", "Papalexi", "Frangieh_control", "Frangieh_ifn_gamma")

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset, levels = desired_order))
```


```{r,fig.width=10,fig.height=5}
# ── Dot + line plot（connected paired dot plot）────────────
# 数据结构：每个 dataset，两个方法的 total discoveries，用线连接

dot_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(dataset, method) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(count[segment %in% c("Shared", "Sceptre+ACAT only", "OPERA only") &
                                !(segment == "Shared" & method == "OPERA")]),
            # 每个 bar 的真实 total = Shared + method-only
            # Sceptre+ACAT bar: Shared + Sceptre+ACAT only
            # OPERA bar:        Shared + OPERA only
            total = sum(count),   # sum 后会重复 Shared，需要重算
            .groups = "drop")

# 更清晰地重算每个方法的真实 total
dot_df <- plot_df %>%
  filter(
    (method == "Sceptre+ACAT" & segment %in% c("Shared", "Sceptre+ACAT only")) |
    (method == "OPERA"        & segment %in% c("Shared", "OPERA only"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(dataset, method) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(count), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(dot_df, aes(x = method, y = total, group = dataset)) +
  # 连线
  geom_line(aes(color = dataset), linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  # 点
  geom_point(aes(color = dataset), size = 3.5) +
  # 在点旁边标注数值
  geom_text(aes(label = total, color = dataset),
            hjust = -0.3, size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2", name = "Dataset") +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.15, 0.25))) +  # 右侧留空给标签
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Significant discoveries"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

# Fig. 1C (NTC qqplot)



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)

qq_curve_from_mat <- function(pmat, set_label, dataset, cap = 6){
  p <- as.numeric(as.matrix(pmat))
  p <- p[!is.na(p)]
  p[p <= 0] <- 1e-250
  p[p >= 1] <- 1 - 1e-6
  p <- sort(p)
  n <- length(p)

  tibble(
    expected = -log10(ppoints(n)),
    observed = pmin(-log10(p), cap),
    Set = set_label,      # 用于颜色（OPERA vs SCEPTRE+ACAT）
    Dataset = dataset     # 用于分组（每个dataset一条线）
  )
}

qq_envelope_maxn <- function(df_long, ci = 0.9, cap = 6){
  max_n <- df_long %>%
    group_by(Set, Dataset) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups="drop") %>%
    summarise(max_n = max(n)) %>%
    pull(max_n)

  exp_env <- -log10(ppoints(max_n))
  lower <- pmin(-log10(qbeta((1-ci)/2, seq_len(max_n), rev(seq_len(max_n)))), cap)
  upper <- pmin(-log10(qbeta((1+ci)/2, seq_len(max_n), rev(seq_len(max_n)))), cap)

  tibble(expected = exp_env, ymin = lower, ymax = upper)
}

plot_qq_overlay_multi_dataset <- function(mats_gray, mats_blue,
                                         label_gray = "SCEPTRE + ACAT",
                                         label_blue = "OPERA",
                                         title = "NTC QQ plot (datasets x methods)",
                                         ci = 0.9, cap = 6,
                                         add_method_median = TRUE){

  ds <- intersect(names(mats_gray), names(mats_blue))
  if (length(ds) == 0) stop("mats_gray and mats_blue have no shared names (dataset names).")

  df_gray <- bind_rows(lapply(ds, function(d){
    qq_curve_from_mat(mats_gray[[d]], label_gray, d, cap = cap)
  }))
  df_blue <- bind_rows(lapply(ds, function(d){
    qq_curve_from_mat(mats_blue[[d]], label_blue, d, cap = cap)
  }))
  df <- bind_rows(df_gray, df_blue)

  env_df <- qq_envelope_maxn(df, ci = ci, cap = cap)

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = env_df,
                aes(x = expected, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
                fill = "grey85", alpha = 0.35) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_line(
      data = df,
      aes(x = expected, y = observed,
          group = interaction(Set, Dataset),
          color = Set,
          linetype = Dataset),          # <- 关键：dataset 用线型区分
      linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.35
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "SCEPTRE + ACAT" = "grey20",
      "OPERA" = "red"
    )) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = expression(Expected~~-log[10](P)),
      y = expression(Observed~~-log[10](P)),
      color = NULL,
      linetype = NULL                  # <- dataset 图例标题（不想要标题就设 NULL）
    ) +
    ylim(0, cap) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.key.width = unit(1.2, "cm")
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 1, linewidth = 2)),
      linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 1, linewidth = 1.2))
    )

  # median 粗线（如果你开启）
  if (add_method_median) {
    grid_x <- seq(0, cap, length.out = 400)

    df_med <- df %>%
      group_by(Set, Dataset) %>%
      summarise(obs_interp = list(approx(expected, observed, xout = grid_x, rule = 2)$y),
                .groups = "drop") %>%
      tidyr::unnest_wider(obs_interp)

    df_med_long <- df_med %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = -c(Set, Dataset), names_to = "idx", values_to = "obs") %>%
      mutate(expected = grid_x[as.integer(gsub("\\D", "", idx))]) %>%
      group_by(Set, expected) %>%
      summarise(observed = median(obs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

    p <- p +
      geom_line(data = df_med_long,
                aes(x = expected, y = observed, color = Set),
                linewidth = 1.6, alpha = 0.95)
  }

  p
}

```


```{r}
mats_gray <- list(
  Frangieh_control = ntc_frangieh_control_SCEPTRE,
  Frangieh_ifn_gamma = ntc_frangieh_ifn_SCEPTRE,
  Papalexi = ntc_papalexi_SCEPTRE,
  Morris = ntc_morris_SCEPTRE
)

mats_blue <- list(
  Frangieh_control = ntc_frangieh_control_OPERA,
  Frangieh_ifn_gamma = ntc_frangieh_ifn_OPERA,
  Papalexi = ntc_papalexi_OPERA,
  Morris = ntc_morris_OPERA
)
```


```{r,fig.width=10}
p <- plot_qq_overlay_multi_dataset(
  mats_gray, mats_blue,
  label_gray = "SCEPTRE + ACAT",
  label_blue = "OPERA",
  title = "NTC QQ plot (4 datasets, 2 methods)",
  ci = 0.9, cap = 10,
  add_method_median = F
)

print(p)

```

# Fig. 2B (Topic geneset Heat map)

```{r,fig.width=15, fig.height=15}

gene_set_K100 <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_model/distance_mapping/K100/gene_set_K100.rds")
clean_vec <- function(x) unique(as.character(x))

L1 <- lapply(gene_set_K100   , clean_vec)
L2 <- lapply(gene_set_K100  , clean_vec)

# pairwise Jaccard matrix
jaccard_mat <- outer(
  seq_along(L1),
  seq_along(L2),
  Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    a <- L1[[i]]
    b <- L2[[j]]
    if (length(a) == 0 && length(b) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    length(intersect(a, b)) / max(length(a),length(b))
  })
)

rownames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L1)
colnames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L2)
jaccard_mat

mat <- as.matrix(jaccard_mat)
storage.mode(mat) <- "numeric"

pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 0,
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  angle_col = 45,
  filename = "jaccard_heatmap.pdf",
  width = 12, height = 12
)
```


# Topic annotation

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)
gene_set_K100 <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_geneset/flames_200kb/de_70_0.01_2_0.5.rds")
gene_sets <- lapply(gene_set_K100, function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5 , function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# 建议给每个 set 一个名字（没有就补上）
if (is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) <- paste0("set_", seq_along(gene_sets))

res <- gost(
  query = gene_sets,                 # list of 100 gene vectors
  organism = "hsapiens",
  multi_query = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr",
  user_threshold = 0.05,
  sources = c("GO:BP","GO:MF","KEGG")
)

names(res$result)   # 这时通常会看到 query / p_value / p_value_adj 等列

```


```{r}

# geneset 名字：如果你有 gene_sets 的 names 就用它；否则自动生成
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names)) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_along(res$result$significant[[1]]))

# GO term 名字：用 term_id 或 term_name（建议 term_id 更稳定）
go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_id)
# 如果你更想用可读名字：
# go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_name)

# 1) list -> 矩阵：每列一个 term，每行一个 geneset
sig_term_by_set <- do.call(cbind, res$result$significant)
storage.mode(sig_term_by_set) <- "logical"

# 2) 转成“geneset(行) × term(列)”的 index matrix
idx_mat <- sig_term_by_set  # 现在行=geneset, 列=term（通常就是这个方向）
rownames(idx_mat) <- gs_names
colnames(idx_mat) <- go_names

# 检查维度：应该是 100 x (#terms)
dim(idx_mat)

# 如果你发现方向反了（极少数情况），就用这一句修正：
# idx_mat <- t(idx_mat)

```


```{r}
rowSums(idx_mat)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

go_tbl <- as_tibble(res$result)

# geneset 名称（如果你有 names(gene_sets) 就用它；否则自动生成）
G <- length(go_tbl$p_values[[1]])
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names) || length(gs_names) != G) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_len(G))

# 展开：term × geneset 的长表
go_long <- go_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    query = list(gs_names),
    p_value = p_values
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(source, term_id, term_name, query, p_value) %>%
  unnest(c(query, p_value))

# 每个 geneset 取 top10（p_value 最小）
top10_tbl <- go_long %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()

# 你想要的：每个 geneset 的 top10 term_name（以及可选的 p_value）
top10_names <- top10_tbl %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  summarise(top10_term_name = list(term_name), .groups = "drop")

top10_tbl      # 长表：每个 geneset 10 行
top10_names    # 每个 geneset 1 行，top10 term_name 是一个 list

```

```{r}
significant_geneset_name <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/mediation_analysis/MCH/flames_200kb/k70/significant_associations.rds")

```


```{r}
keep_sets <- unique(significant_geneset_name$module)

top10_keep <- top10_names %>%
  dplyr::filter(query %in% keep_sets)
top10_keep
```
```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(top10_keep)){
  print(top10_keep[i,2][[1]])
}
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

# top10_names: data.frame/tibble with columns: query, top10_term_name (list of character vectors)
# 例如你之前的：top10_names <- top10_tbl %>% group_by(query) %>% summarise(top10_term_name=list(term_name))


theme_dict <- list(

  # 1) Immune / inflammation / hemostasis
  Immune_activation = c(
    "cell activation",
    "leukocyte activation",
    "myeloid leukocyte activation",
    "regulation of leukocyte activation",
    "regulation of cell activation",
    "lymphocyte activation",
    "regulation of lymphocyte activation",
    "immune system process",
    "regulation of immune system process",
    "immune response",
    "regulation of macrophage cytokine production",
    "macrophage cytokine production",
    "regulation of interleukin-10 production",
    "phagocytosis, engulfment",
    "plasma membrane invagination",
    "response to interferon-alpha",
    "complement and coagulation cascades",
    "platelet activation"
  ),

  # 2) Red blood cell / heme / oxygen transport / ROS detox
  Redox_heme_oxygen = c(
    "haptoglobin binding",
    "oxygen carrier activity",
    "oxygen transport",
    "gas transport",
    "oxygen binding",
    "hydrogen peroxide catabolic process",
    "hydrogen peroxide metabolic process",
    "peroxidase activity",
    "antioxidant activity",
    "oxidoreductase activity, acting on peroxide as acceptor"
  ),

  # 3) Mitochondria & oxidative phosphorylation / respiration / energy
  Mito_OXPHOS_respiration = c(
    "oxidative phosphorylation",
    "mitochondrial ATP synthesis coupled electron transport",
    "ATP synthesis coupled electron transport",
    "respiratory electron transport chain",
    "electron transport chain",
    "proton transmembrane transport",
    "aerobic respiration",
    "cellular respiration",
    "energy derivation by oxidation of organic compounds",
    "proton motive force-driven mitochondrial ATP synthesis",
    "proton motive force-driven ATP synthesis",
    "proton motive force-driven ATP synthesis",
    "proton motive force-driven ATP synthesis",
    "ATP biosynthetic process",
    "generation of precursor metabolites and energy",
    "thermogenesis"
  ),

  # 4) Cell cycle / mitosis / chromosome segregation / spindle / kinetochore
  Cell_cycle_mitosis = c(
    "cell cycle",
    "cell cycle process",
    "mitotic cell cycle",
    "mitotic cell cycle process",
    "mitotic nuclear division",
    "cell division",
    "nuclear division",
    "organelle fission",
    "chromosome segregation",
    "sister chromatid segregation",
    "mitotic sister chromatid segregation",
    "nuclear chromosome segregation",
    "chromosome separation",
    "regulation of chromosome separation",
    "regulation of mitotic sister chromatid separation",
    "mitotic sister chromatid separation",
    "metaphase/anaphase transition of mitotic cell cycle",
    "metaphase/anaphase transition of cell cycle",
    "spindle organization",
    "mitotic spindle assembly",
    "metaphase chromosome alignment",
    "chromosome localization",
    "establishment of chromosome localization",
    "protein localization to kinetochore involved in kinetochore assembly",
    "centromere complex assembly",
    "chromatin remodeling at centromere",
    "CENP-A containing chromatin assembly",
    "mitotic sister chromatid segregation"
  ),

  # 5) DNA replication / repair / genome maintenance
  DNA_replication_repair = c(
    "DNA replication",
    "DNA-templated DNA replication",
    "DNA replication initiation",
    "DNA repair",
    "DNA damage response",
    "double-strand break repair via homologous recombination",
    "homologous recombination", # 注意：你的列表里没有这一条，下面我不会放；这里先删掉
    "recombinational repair",
    "Mismatch repair",
    "DNA metabolic process"
  ),

  # 6) Chromatin / nucleosome / epigenetics / transcriptional regulation
  Chromatin_epigenetics = c(
    "chromatin organization",
    "chromatin remodeling",
    "chromosome organization",
    "protein-DNA complex assembly",
    "protein-DNA complex organization",
    "protein localization to chromosome",
    "protein localization to chromatin",
    "structural constituent of chromatin",
    "structural molecule activity",
    "chromatin binding",
    "chromatin DNA binding",
    "nucleosomal DNA binding",
    "nucleosome binding",
    "nucleosome assembly",
    "nucleosome organization",
    "ATP-dependent chromatin remodeling",
    "histone binding",
    "epigenetic regulation of gene expression",
    "negative regulation of gene expression, epigenetic",
    "site-specific DNA-methyltransferase (adenine-specific) activity",
    "histone H4K12 methyltransferase activity",
    "histone H4R3 methyltransferase activity",
    "arsenite methyltransferase activity",
    "protein-glutamine N-methyltransferase activity",
    "DNA-templated transcription",
    "DNA-templated transcription initiation",
    "transcription initiation at RNA polymerase II promoter",
    "positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II",
    "negative regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II",
    "regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II",
    "positive regulation of DNA-templated transcription",
    "positive regulation of DNA-templated transcription",
    "DNA-binding transcription activator activity",
    "DNA-binding transcription activator activity, RNA polymerase II-specific",
    "sequence-specific DNA binding",
    "transcription regulator activity"
  ),

  # 7) RNA processing / splicing / RNA metabolism
  RNA_processing_splicing = c(
    "RNA processing",
    "RNA splicing",
    "mRNA processing",
    "Spliceosome",
    "mRNA metabolic process",
    "RNA metabolic process",
    "RNA biosynthetic process",
    "regulation of RNA metabolic process",
    "negative regulation of RNA metabolic process",
    "regulation of mRNA metabolic process",
    "nucleic acid metabolic process",
    "nucleic acid biosynthetic process",
    "nucleobase-containing compound biosynthetic process",
    "regulation of nucleobase-containing compound metabolic process",
    "positive regulation of RNA metabolic process",
    "negative regulation of RNA biosynthetic process",
    "rRNA metabolic process",
    "rRNA processing",
    "snoRNA guided rRNA pseudouridine synthesis",
    "snoRNA binding",
    "tRNA binding",
    "tRNA metabolic process",
    "tRNA processing",
    "tRNA modification",
    "RNA modification",
    "catalytic activity, acting on RNA",
    "catalytic activity, acting on a tRNA"
  ),

  # 8) Translation / ribosome / ribonucleoprotein biogenesis
  Translation_ribosome = c(
    "translation",
    "cytoplasmic translation",
    "translation initiation factor activity",
    "translation factor activity",
    "translation initiation factor activity",
    "regulation of translation",
    "positive regulation of translation",
    "translational elongation",
    "translational termination",
    "Ribosome",
    "structural constituent of ribosome",
    "ribosome binding",
    "ribosomal large subunit binding",
    "ribosome biogenesis",
    "ribosomal large subunit biogenesis",
    "ribosomal small subunit biogenesis",
    "ribosomal small subunit assembly",
    "mitochondrial small ribosomal subunit assembly",
    "ribonucleoprotein complex biogenesis",
    "ribonucleoprotein complex binding",
    "RNA binding",
    "mRNA binding",
    "mRNA 3'-UTR binding",
    "mRNA 3'-UTR AU-rich region binding",
    "rescue of stalled ribosome",
    "ribosome disassembly",
    "mitochondrial translation",
    "mitochondrial gene expression"
  ),

  # 9) Protein turnover / ubiquitin / proteasome / catabolism
  Protein_catabolism_ubiquitin = c(
    "macromolecule catabolic process",
    "catabolic process",
    "protein catabolic process",
    "ubiquitin-dependent protein catabolic process",
    "ubiquitin-dependent protein catabolic process via the multivesicular body sorting pathway",
    "proteolysis involved in protein catabolic process",
    "modification-dependent protein catabolic process",
    "modification-dependent macromolecule catabolic process",
    "protein K48-linked ubiquitination",
    "protein neddylation",
    "protein neddylation",
    "Proteasome",
    "protein metabolic process",
    "regulation of protein metabolic process",
    "protein-macromolecule adaptor activity",
    "regulation of catabolic process",
    "negative regulation of metabolic process",
    "negative regulation of cellular process"
  ),

  # 10) ER stress / folding / ERAD / chaperones
  ER_stress_folding_ERAD = c(
    "Protein processing in endoplasmic reticulum",
    "protein processing in endoplasmic reticulum",
    "protein folding",
    "protein folding in endoplasmic reticulum",
    "misfolded protein binding",
    "protein maturation",
    "response to endoplasmic reticulum stress",
    "endoplasmic reticulum unfolded protein response",
    "regulation of response to endoplasmic reticulum stress",
    "integrated stress response signaling",
    "positive regulation of endoplasmic reticulum stress-induced intrinsic apoptotic signaling pathway",
    "ERAD pathway",
    "heat shock protein binding",
    "chaperone-mediated protein folding",
    "protein folding chaperone",
```
