```{r}
    "ATP-dependent protein folding chaperone",
    "protein refolding",
    "cellular response to heat",
    "response to heat",
    "chaperone cofactor-dependent protein refolding",
    "intramolecular oxidoreductase activity, transposing S-S bonds",
    "protein disulfide isomerase activity",
    "protein-disulfide reductase activity",
    "disulfide oxidoreductase activity",
    "oxidoreductase activity, acting on a sulfur group of donors",
    "cysteine-type endopeptidase activity",
    "cysteine-type peptidase activity"
  ),

  # 11) Vesicle trafficking / Golgi-ER / nuclear transport / localization
  Vesicle_trafficking_transport = c(
    "intracellular transport",
    "intracellular protein transport",
    "protein transport",
    "protein localization",
    "cellular macromolecule localization",
    "macromolecule localization",
    "cellular localization",
    "establishment of localization in cell",
    "establishment of protein localization",
    "protein localization to nucleus",
    "protein localization to chromosome",
    "protein localization to chromatin",
    "endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport",
    "Golgi vesicle transport",
    "retrograde vesicle-mediated transport, Golgi to endoplasmic reticulum",
    "Nucleocytoplasmic transport",
    "nucleocytoplasmic transport",
    "nuclear transport",
    "nuclear export",
    "structural constituent of nuclear pore",
    "membraneless organelle assembly"
  ),

  # 12) Cytoskeleton / adhesion / junctions / membrane organization
  Cytoskeleton_adhesion_junction = c(
    "actin filament-based process",
    "actin cytoskeleton organization",
    "actin filament organization",
    "actin binding",
    "actin filament binding",
    "cytoskeleton organization",
    "cytoskeletal protein binding",
    "Tight junction",
    "cadherin binding involved in cell-cell adhesion",
    "cadherin binding",
    "cell-cell adhesion",
    "cell adhesion",
    "cell-cell adhesion mediator activity",
    "cell adhesion mediator activity",
    "S100 protein binding",
    "membrane organization"
  ),

  # 13) Membrane transporters (nucleosides, amino acids, organic acids, anions)
  Membrane_transporters = c(
    "uracil transmembrane transporter activity",
    "cytidine transmembrane transporter activity",
    "guanine transmembrane transporter activity",
    "adenine transmembrane transporter activity",
    "uridine transmembrane transporter activity",
    "purine nucleoside transmembrane transporter activity",
    "pyrimidine nucleobase transmembrane transporter activity",
    "UDP-glucuronate transmembrane transport",
    "UDP-N-acetylgalactosamine transmembrane transport",
    "UDP-glucuronate transmembrane transporter activity",
    "UDP-N-acetylgalactosamine transmembrane transporter activity",
    "malate transmembrane transporter activity",
    "oxaloacetate transmembrane transporter activity",
    "malate transmembrane transport",
    "oxaloacetate(2-) transmembrane transport",
    "C4-dicarboxylate transmembrane transporter activity",
    "sulfate transmembrane transporter activity",
    "sulfate transmembrane transport",
    "phosphate transmembrane transporter activity",
    "L-amino acid transmembrane transporter activity",
    "acidic amino acid transmembrane transporter activity",
    "amino acid transmembrane transporter activity",
    "amino acid transmembrane transport",
    "organic acid transmembrane transporter activity",
    "organic acid transmembrane transport",
    "amino acid import across plasma membrane",
    "L-alpha-amino acid transmembrane transport",
    "L-amino acid transport",
    "malate transport",
    "oxaloacetate transport"
  ),

  # 14) Lipid / sterol / lipoprotein metabolism & transfer
  Lipid_sterol_lipoprotein = c(
    "sterol biosynthetic process",
    "sterol metabolic process",
    "cholesterol biosynthetic process",
    "cholesterol metabolic process",
    "lipid biosynthetic process",
    "lipid metabolic process",
    "steroid biosynthetic process",
    "secondary alcohol metabolic process",
    "secondary alcohol biosynthetic process",
    "alcohol metabolic process",
    "high-density lipoprotein particle remodeling",
    "plasma lipoprotein particle remodeling",
    "plasma lipoprotein particle organization",
    "protein-lipid complex remodeling",
    "protein-lipid complex organization",
    "protein-containing complex remodeling",
    "cholesterol efflux",
    "very-low-density lipoprotein particle clearance",
    "regulation of cholesterol transport",
    "regulation of sterol transport",
    "cholesterol transfer activity",
    "sterol transfer activity",
    "positive regulation of bile acid biosynthetic process",
    "positive regulation of bile acid metabolic process",
    "positive regulation of steroid biosynthetic process"
  ),

  # 15) Metal / mineral homeostasis & detox
  Metal_homeostasis = c(
    "Mineral absorption",
    "cellular homeostasis",
    "chemical homeostasis",
    "intracellular chemical homeostasis",
    "metal chelating activity",
    "metal ion binding",
    "cation binding",
    "ion binding",
    "detoxification of copper ion",
    "stress response to copper ion",
    "cellular response to copper ion",
    "cellular response to zinc ion",
    "stress response to metal ion",
    "detoxification of inorganic compound"
  ),

  # 16) Central metabolism / amino acids / one-carbon / glycolysis / nucleotides
  Metabolism_core = c(
    "Biosynthesis of amino acids",
    "amino acid biosynthetic process",
    "proteinogenic amino acid biosynthetic process",
    "L-amino acid biosynthetic process",
    "L-serine biosynthetic process",
    "serine family amino acid biosynthetic process",
    "alpha-amino acid biosynthetic process",
    "serine transport",
    "L-serine transport",
    "L-serine metabolic process",
    "Carbon metabolism",
    "One carbon pool by folate",
    "glycolytic process",
    "small molecule metabolic process",
    "small molecule catabolic process",
    "pyridine-containing compound catabolic process",
    "pyridine nucleotide catabolic process",
    "ADP metabolic process",
    "ADP catabolic process",
    "purine nucleoside diphosphate catabolic process",
    "purine ribonucleoside diphosphate catabolic process",
    "ribonucleoside diphosphate catabolic process",
    "nucleoside diphosphate catabolic process",
    "purine nucleoside diphosphate metabolic process",
    "ATP:ADP adenylyltransferase activity",
    "purine nucleoside triphosphate biosynthetic process",
    "purine ribonucleoside triphosphate biosynthetic process",
    "ribonucleoside triphosphate biosynthetic process",
    "nucleoside triphosphate biosynthetic process",
    "pyrimidine nucleobase biosynthetic process",
    "nucleotide metabolic process",
    "nucleobase-containing compound metabolic process"
  ),

  # 17) Signaling / developmental / vascular programs
  Signaling_development = c(
    "Hippo signaling pathway",
    "TGF-beta signaling pathway",
    "Signaling pathways regulating pluripotency of stem cells",
    "vasculogenesis",
    "blood vessel development",
    "vasculature development",
    "tube development",
    "tube morphogenesis",
    "anatomical structure development",
    "anatomical structure formation involved in morphogenesis",
    "anatomical structure morphogenesis",
    "developmental process",
    "multicellular organism development",
    "multicellular organismal process",
    "system development",
    "intracellular signal transduction",
    "canonical NF-kappaB signal transduction",
    "regulation of canonical NF-kappaB signal transduction"
  ),

  # 18) Disease / KEGG context (non-GO, but present in your list)
  Disease_KEGG_context = c(
    "Parkinson disease",
    "Huntington disease",
    "Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis",
    "Diabetic cardiomyopathy",
    "Viral myocarditis",
    "Coronavirus disease - COVID-19",
    "Chemical carcinogenesis - reactive oxygen species",
    "Transcriptional misregulation in cancer",
    "Systemic lupus erythematosus",
    "Alcoholism",
    "Mitophagy - animal",
    "Motor proteins"  # 这也是 KEGG-like term，在你的列表里出现
  )
)



# 2) 把每个 geneset 的 top terms 拼成一个文本，便于匹配
gs_text <- top10_names %>%
  dplyr::mutate(text = purrr::map_chr(top10_term_name, ~ stringr::str_to_lower(paste(.x, collapse=" ; "))))

library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)



library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
```


```{r}
# 如果 gs_text 目前只有 text 列，就补 query
if (!"query" %in% names(gs_text)) {
  gs_names <- if (exists("gene_sets") && !is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) else paste0("k", seq_len(nrow(gs_text)))
  gs_text <- gs_text %>% mutate(query = gs_names, .before = 1)
}
text_vec <- gs_text$text

library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

# 1) 拆 term
df_terms <- tibble(query = gs_text$query, text = gs_text$text) %>%
  mutate(term = str_split(text, "\\s*;\\s*")) %>%
  unnest(term) %>%
  mutate(term = str_trim(str_to_lower(term))) %>%
  filter(term != "")

term_to_themes <- function(term, theme_dict) {
  hits <- names(theme_dict)[map_lgl(theme_dict, ~ any(str_detect(term, fixed(str_to_lower(.x)))))]
  if (length(hits) == 0) NA_character_ else hits
}

df_map <- df_terms %>%
  mutate(theme = map(term, term_to_themes, theme_dict = theme_dict)) %>%
  unnest(theme) %>%
  filter(!is.na(theme))

# 3A) 主题命中条目数（一个 term 可以给多个主题加 1）
theme_count <- df_map %>%
  count(query, theme, name = "n_terms") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = theme, values_from = n_terms, values_fill = 0)





```

```{r,fig.width=15,fig.height=12}
library(pheatmap)

x <- theme_count %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("query") %>%   # query 作为行名
  as.matrix()

pheatmap(
  t(x),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_cols = T,
  color  = colorRampPalette(c("white", "#FDAE61"))(100),
  breaks = seq(min(x), max(x), length.out = 101),
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  angle_col = 45,
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 0
)

```

```{r,fig.height=6}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

row_top_fun <- theme_count %>%
  pivot_longer(-query, names_to = "GO_category", values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  mutate(max_count = max(count, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(count == max_count) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%                 # 并列最大时取第一个
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(GO_category = ifelse(max_count == 0 | is.na(max_count), "Unassigned", GO_category)) %>%
  dplyr::select(query, GO_category)

fun_summary <- row_top_fun %>%
  count(GO_category, name = "n_geneset") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_geneset)) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(GO_category, "\n", n_geneset))

ggplot(fun_summary, aes(x = "", y = n_geneset, fill = GO_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Top function per geneset (row-wise max)") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n_geneset),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3)

```
# Overlap between geneset of different K -- MCH





```{r}
get_de_genes <- function(de, k,
                         lfsr_thr = 0.01,
                         z_thr    = 2,
                         fc_thr   = 0.5,
                         gene_names) {

  z_k     <- de$z[, k]
  lfsr_k  <- de$lfsr[, k]
  beta_k  <- de$postmean[, k]   

  # 先去掉 NA
  ok <- !is.na(z_k) & !is.na(lfsr_k) & !is.na(beta_k)

  idx <- which(
    ok &
      lfsr_k <= lfsr_thr &      # 置信度高
      abs(z_k)   >= z_thr &     # z 比较大
      abs(beta_k) >= fc_thr     # fold change 比较大
  )

  gene_names[idx]
}
```


```{r}
de <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_model/flames_200kb/de_70.rds")


de_genes_list <- lapply(seq_len(ncol(de$z)),
                        function(k) get_de_genes(de, k,gene_names=rownames(de$F)))
names(de_genes_list) <- paste0("k", seq_len(ncol(de$z)))

filtered_list_70 <- Filter(function(x) length(x) > 5, de_genes_list)


de <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_model/flames_200kb/de_100.rds")


de_genes_list <- lapply(seq_len(ncol(de$z)),
                        function(k) get_de_genes(de, k,gene_names=rownames(de$F)))
names(de_genes_list) <- paste0("k", seq_len(ncol(de$z)))

filtered_list_100 <- Filter(function(x) length(x) > 4, de_genes_list)



de <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_model/flames_200kb/de_60.rds")


de_genes_list <- lapply(seq_len(ncol(de$z)),
                        function(k) get_de_genes(de, k,gene_names=rownames(de$F)))
names(de_genes_list) <- paste0("k", seq_len(ncol(de$z)))

filtered_list_60 <- Filter(function(x) length(x) > 4, de_genes_list)


de <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_model/flames_200kb/de_50.rds")


de_genes_list <- lapply(seq_len(ncol(de$z)),
                        function(k) get_de_genes(de, k,gene_names=rownames(de$F)))
names(de_genes_list) <- paste0("k", seq_len(ncol(de$z)))

filtered_list_50 <- Filter(function(x) length(x) > 4, de_genes_list)




```

```{r}

clean_vec <- function(x) unique(as.character(x))

L1 <- lapply(filtered_list_50, clean_vec)
L2 <- lapply(filtered_list_60, clean_vec)

# pairwise Jaccard matrix
jaccard_mat <- outer(
  seq_along(L1),
  seq_along(L2),
  Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    a <- L1[[i]]
    b <- L2[[j]]
    if (length(a) == 0 && length(b) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    length(intersect(a, b)) / max(length(a),length(b))
  })
)

rownames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L1)
colnames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L2)


library(pheatmap)

mat <- as.matrix(jaccard_mat)
storage.mode(mat) <- "numeric"

pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  angle_col = 45
)
```

```{r}
idx <- which(mat > 0.5, arr.ind = TRUE)

out <- data.frame(
  row_index = idx[, "row"],
  col_index = idx[, "col"],
  row_name  = rownames(mat)[idx[, "row"]],
  col_name  = colnames(mat)[idx[, "col"]],
  value     = mat[idx],
  row.names = NULL
)

out
```


```{r}

clean_vec <- function(x) unique(as.character(x))

L1 <- lapply(filtered_list_50, clean_vec)
L2 <- lapply(filtered_list_70, clean_vec)

# pairwise Jaccard matrix
jaccard_mat <- outer(
  seq_along(L1),
  seq_along(L2),
  Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    a <- L1[[i]]
    b <- L2[[j]]
    if (length(a) == 0 && length(b) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    length(intersect(a, b)) / max(length(a),length(b))
  })
)

rownames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L1)
colnames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L2)


library(pheatmap)

mat <- as.matrix(jaccard_mat)
storage.mode(mat) <- "numeric"

pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  angle_col = 45
)
```

```{r}

clean_vec <- function(x) unique(as.character(x))

L1 <- lapply(filtered_list_50, clean_vec)
L2 <- lapply(filtered_list_50, clean_vec)

# pairwise Jaccard matrix
jaccard_mat <- outer(
  seq_along(L1),
  seq_along(L2),
  Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    a <- L1[[i]]
    b <- L2[[j]]
    if (length(a) == 0 && length(b) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    length(intersect(a, b)) / max(length(b),length(b))
  })
)

rownames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L1)
colnames(jaccard_mat) <- names(L2)


library(pheatmap)

mat <- as.matrix(jaccard_mat)
storage.mode(mat) <- "numeric"

pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  angle_col = 45
)
```

# Efficiency

## OPERA

### Morris

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# 设置目录路径
out_dir <- "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/OPERA/snakemake/logs_morris/out"  # ← 改成你的实际路径

out_files <- list.files(out_dir, pattern = "\\.out$", full.names = TRUE)

parse_out_file <- function(filepath) {
  lines <- readLines(filepath, warn = FALSE)
  
  header_idx <- grep("Elapsed_Time_sec", lines)
  if (length(header_idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # 每个文件可能有多个步骤（多行数据）
  chunks <- lapply(header_idx, function(i) {
    header <- strsplit(trimws(lines[i]), "\\s+")[[1]]
    data   <- strsplit(trimws(lines[i + 1]), "\\s+")[[1]]
    if (length(data) == length(header) + 1) data <- data[-1]  # 去行号
    df <- as.data.frame(t(data), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    colnames(df) <- header
    df
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  chunks$file  <- basename(filepath)
  chunks$chunk <- str_extract(basename(filepath), "chunk_\\d+")  # 提取 chunk_N
  chunks
}

# 读取所有文件
all_steps <- lapply(out_files, parse_out_file) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(
    Elapsed_Time_sec   = as.numeric(Elapsed_Time_sec),
    Total_RAM_Used_MiB = as.numeric(Total_RAM_Used_MiB),
    Peak_RAM_Used_MiB  = as.numeric(Peak_RAM_Used_MiB),
    # 按数字排序用
    chunk_num = as.integer(str_extract(chunk, "\\d+"))
  )

# 以 chunk 为单位汇总
chunk_summary <- all_steps %>%
  group_by(chunk, chunk_num) %>%
  summarise(
    n_steps            = n(),
    total_Elapsed_sec  = sum(Elapsed_Time_sec,   na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Elapsed_min  = round(sum(Elapsed_Time_sec, na.rm = TRUE) / 60, 2),
    max_Peak_RAM_MiB   = max(Peak_RAM_Used_MiB,  na.rm = TRUE),
    max_Peak_RAM_GiB   = round(max(Peak_RAM_Used_MiB, na.rm = TRUE) / 1024, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(chunk_num)

print(chunk_summary)

# 所有 chunk 的总体统计
overall <- tibble(
  total_chunks       = nrow(chunk_summary),
  total_Elapsed_sec  = sum(chunk_summary$total_Elapsed_sec),
  total_Elapsed_min  = round(sum(chunk_summary$total_Elapsed_sec) / 60, 2),
  max_Peak_RAM_MiB   = max(chunk_summary$max_Peak_RAM_MiB),   # 所有 chunk 中最高峰值
  max_Peak_RAM_GiB   = round(max(chunk_summary$max_Peak_RAM_MiB) / 1024, 2)
)

cat("\n── Overall ──\n")
print(overall)
```

```{r}
median(chunk_summary$total_Elapsed_min)
```



### Morris
